answer: Tokyo's most recent reported population is 36,954,000 in 2026. This is a slight decline from the 2025 population of 37,036,000. The city's population has been decreasing in recent years.

results.snippet: As of 2025, the total population of Tokyo is 14,195,730 and had the largest population (11.5 percent of the total population).

results.title: Tokyo - Data Commons
results.snippet: Tokyo is a city in Japan. The population in Tokyo was 14,085,890 in 2023. The life expectancy in Tokyo was 84.87 in 2020.
